claims.claim: The GAIA /map OSM demo has a complete evidence chain from map layer to OSM feature binding, GAIA feature, H3 spatial coverage, advisory route graph, and Sherlock discovery record.
The OSM map workbench proof identifies ingestion, route graph, and tile export runtimes, but those runtimes remain proof/runtime-boundary records and are not Lattice-admitted runtime assets.
The GAIA /map OSM route graph remains advisory and is not approved for safety-critical navigation, dispatch authority, or live route guidance.

approvalState.reason: This candidate opens evidence and governance review only. It does not execute routing, dispatch, runtime admission, or infrastructure action.

replayRequirements.notes: Replay should re-read the MeshRush GAIA map crystallization fixture and the referenced GAIA/Sherlock/SocioSphere evidence. No route execution, runtime admission, dispatch, or external actuation is run.

rollbackSemantics.notes: No execution state is mutated by this candidate. If withdrawn, mark candidate superseded and preserve all evidence, provenance, and advisory-boundary refs.
